programmes.show_name: HerrHausen - The Banker and the Bomb
programmes.show_description: After Herrhausen's early contact with Gorbachev failed, Black Monday in 1987 validated his financial warnings.
Programmes Start at 12:05.
Mackenzie and Levi are counting down the days until Mac's pregnancy has hit the 12-week threshold and they can finally spread the word of their pregnancy.
Lacey and David are headed out of the hospital, unpacking Jo ending her engagement when Lacey bumps into Holden, a survivor from the train crash.
The owner of a bridal styling business turns to a friend for help in impressing the man she is infatuated with. Romantic comedy, starring Janel Parrish and Marco Grazzini.
Lexie is determined to run the estate the way her husband would have wished, and a power struggle develops as she takes on more responsibilities.
Lexie and Dorothy clash over the ownership of an island in the loch and soon find themselves marooned.
Siegfried hires an experienced bookkeeper, but her efficient approach doesn't suit everyone. James and Helen arrive at a big decision, and a ferret presents a challenge.
Patagonia: Simon treks across the high mountains and treacherous ice fields of Patagonia, coming face to face with pumas and riding with gauchos, the cowboys of South America.
Mystical Languages: Documentary that studies the incredible behaviour of wildlife operating within swarms.
Grasslands: Glimpse into grasslands where the biggest animal numbers are found, and see how animal life helps to drawdown carbon.
Island of Giants: Follow the tale of a Lusotitan, one of the largest dinosaurs ever, as he goes looking for love.
Wicky's been called to a remote and windswept lighthouse off the coast of Ireland.
Joanne Cantwell is joined by Anthony Daly and Joe Canning for highlights and analysis of the weekend's Allianz League action.
True Conviction: Charting the final days approaching the scheduled execution of Ivan Cantu. Convicted in 2001 for a double murder in Dallas, he has protested his innocence for over 20 years.
Allied soldiers take off by sea and air, under cover of darkness, and the biggest amphibious invasion in history begins.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Vivienne bears the brunt of a vicious storm. Drew struggles to face reality. Desi breaks the rules for family.
Eden's confused, trying to understand why Remi's decided to move out even though he has a head injury.
From the Famine to the Future: Examing how two million Irish people emigrated in the immediate aftermath of the Famine.
Hugh Cahill is joined by Bernard Jackman, Darren Cave and Donal Lenihan for a look back at the weekend's Six Nations action.
Freddy's Birthday: Frasier discovers that Freddy has been seeing Lilith behind his back, which sets up a battle between the two exes for their grown son's affection.

programmes.show_name: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programmes.show_description: David: Kunkle and Sam are knee-deep in trial; Tovar drives Gacy; Gacy's past grooming of Cram is revealed.
Singer, actress and former X-Factor contestant Mary Byrne (65) from Ballyfermot is ready to face her fear and find love again after ten years of single life.
